title: Zombie Boomer
description: A Zombie variant that has explosive properties.
body:
**Discontinued please use:**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/devyrs-zombies](https://modrinth.com/mod/devyrs-zombies)



Zombie Boomer

A zombie, with a banging personality.

Zombie differences:

- slower than a vanilla zombie
- less health than a vanilla zombie
- Explodes on Death and gives u a negative effect when you are too close to the explosion.

no other differences

allowed in modpacks, with credits. 
no reuploading anywhere.

Made in MCreator.
